basic_details.job_title: DHGMCH Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for House Staff / Junior Resident Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Diamond Harbour Govt. Medical College & Hospital (DHGMCH)
basic_details.short_information: Diamond Harbour Govt. Medical College & Hospital (DHGMCH) House Staff / Junior Resident Notification 2026 has been released on 13 July 2026 on the official website of DHGMCH. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the DHGMCH House Staff / Junior Resident Recruitment 2026.
basic_details.job_location: South Twenty Four Parganas, West Bengal

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS, Internship Completion Certificate, Provisional/Permanent Medical Registration
qualification.details: ANAESTHESIOLOGY: MBBS with completed internship and medical registration. GENERAL SURGERY: MBBS with completed internship and medical registration.

selection_process: Merit List based on academic qualification Counselling
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DHGMCH Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 18-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

rows.diamond_harbour_govt_medical_college_hos: MBBS, Internship Completion Certificate, Provisional/Permanent Medical Registration

content_sections.heading: DHGMCH Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the DHGMCH Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download DHGMCH Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: DHGMCH Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: ANAESTHESIOLOGY: MBBS with completed internship and medical registration. GENERAL SURGERY: MBBS with completed internship and medical registration.

content_sections.heading: DHGMCH Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years for all posts.

content_sections.heading: DHGMCH Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Merit List based on academic qualification Counselling

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for DHGMCH Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 18-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DHGMCH House Staff / Junior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the DHGMCH House Staff / Junior Resident posts is 18-07-2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies released by DHGMCH?
faq.answer: Diamond Harbour Govt. Medical College & Hospital has released a total of 2 vacancies for the House Staff / Junior Resident positions.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for these posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree, an Internship Completion Certificate, and Provisional/Permanent Medical Registration to be eligible for these positions.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 35 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for DHGMCH recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive, making it accessible to all eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q6. How can candidates apply for these positions?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the House Staff / Junior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on a merit list prepared from academic qualifications, followed by a counselling session.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for the recruited candidates?
faq.answer: The positions of House Staff / Junior Resident are on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Which departments have vacancies for House Staff / Junior Residents?
faq.answer: Vacancies are available in ANAESTHESIOLOGY and GENERAL SURGERY departments, with one post in each.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the Diamond Harbour Govt. Medical College & Hospital located?
faq.answer: Diamond Harbour Govt. Medical College & Hospital is located in Diamond Harbour, West Bengal.
